about.title: About NRG-UA
about.subtitle: National B2B distributor of home and business products
about.history_text: NRG-UA is a modern distribution company operating in the Ukrainian market since 2015. We are the exclusive representative of leading global brands and provide the highest quality of service to our partners.
about.mission_text: To provide Ukrainian businesses with quality products at competitive prices with the best service.
